title: linaria capraria
intro: Linaria capraria, also known as the butter and eggs or fairypetal, is a flowering plant species in the toadflax genus. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Linaria capraria can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
